llm_instruction: Use this file only after a candidate job was selected. Copy the BASF URL exactly from job.url; never construct job links.

job.title: GDF/AF - Middleware Engineer - System Integration (EDI, SAP CPI) (M/F/D)
job.description: Objectives Describe your Product mission here (2 - 3 sentences only) BASF’s Business Process Integration (BPI) team provides and supports digital solutions for B2B integrations with external partners through a variety of systems and processes within the BASF’s architectural landscape. BPI is considered a strategic tool to digitalize processes and enable seamless exchange of data between applications, businesses, customers and partners in real-time. Describe the objectives of the role here (2 - 3 sentences only) In this role, you will focus on solution development and operation (DevOps) in accordance with business requirements and enterprise architecture to integrate BASF businesses with external partners, drive efficiencies, and drive BASF’s e-share. You ensure standardized, runnable, supportable, and stable solutions from a technical point of view. Main Tasks / Scope of Work Consulting tasks Consults the BPI team in technical application questions during the solution design and functional specification phase Provides effort estimation for realization and contributes to project planning Creates Technical Design Document supported by the Business Performs configuration and development in systems (e.g. customizing in SAP and / or KAFKA and SAP HANA DB, or in technology stack e.g. java) Manages development activities (internal and external resource planning for development) Supports testing and service transition Collaborates with support team to identify areas of process implementation issues /continuous improvement Translates stakeholder requirements into concrete specifications for different Integration technologies, like SAP CPI, Kafka, API-Management, use of technology stack using java Software engineering tasks: Focus is software design and software architecture of components and applications. Independent development, enhancement, and migration of applications / modules / interfaces / tools / communication solutions Integration and testing of software components within the existing application landscape. Quality assurance and documentation of software developments. Job Requirements Focus on the minimum requirements to carry out the work – you might want to point out “additional plus/nice to have skills” that are not mandatory Edu c a t i o n Master's degree in computer science or STEM major with 4 -6 years of IT or related field experience OR Bachelor's degree in computer science or STEM major with 6 - 8 years of IT or related field experience OR...
